title: operation yashima question
wikitext:
[]: operation yashima question             Quote Post by trident » Wed Dec 09, 2009 5:00 pm In episode 6 when Ramiel pierced Geofront Misato reacted as he(she? it?) was meters from Lilith. He still had to drill through that pyramid and all those defensive layers beneath it, which would take a lot of time.

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Wed Dec 09, 2009 5:23 pm But once inside the Geofront it was only a matter of a few minutes to reach Lilith. The "pyramid" is not that hard to break. Zeruel only had to use its beam.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Dec 09, 2009 5:26 pm Not to mention that at the time, Misato did not know of Lilith's existence, or why exactly it was so bad for the Angels to penetrate NERV HQ.

[]: Re: opearion yashima question             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 09, 2009 5:43 pm trident wrote: In episode 6 when Ramiel pierced Geofront Misato reacted as he(she? it?) was meters from Lilith. He still had to drill through that pyramid and all those defensive layers beneath it, which would take a lot of time.

[]:             Quote Post by trident » Wed Dec 09, 2009 6:36 pm But once inside the Geofront it was only a matter of a few minutes to reach Lilith. The "pyramid" is not that hard to break. Zeruel only had to use its beam.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Dec 09, 2009 6:39 pm Azathoth wrote: Not to mention that at the time, Misato did not know of Lilith's existence, or why exactly it was so bad for the Angels to penetrate NERV HQ.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 09, 2009 6:57 pm @Dr. Webster: Please label the spoiler as "Rebuild 1.0" because anyone will just click into the spoiler tag not knowing what the spoiler relates to exactly. Better safe for another member/lurker than sorry. [code:1][spoiler="Rebuild 1.0"]--the spoiler--[/spoiler][/code:1] trident wrote: why she behaved as the were running out of time while they have plenty of it

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:04 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: @Dr. Webster: Please label the spoiler as "Rebuild 1.0" because anyone will just click into the spoiler tag not knowing what it the spoiler relates to exactly. Better safe for another member/lurker than sorry. [code:1][spoiler="Rebuild 1.0"]--the spoiler--[/spoiler][/code:1]
